phase.label: Portal Pilot Prep
phase.summary: Phase 5 pilot prep is active and technically pilot-ready: the public site, capture layer, media preview player, fan reactions, private access shell, operator reporting, private intake queue workbench, and pilot write gate are live. Full public release still requires Privacy and Terms approval before final approval.

approvals.label: Privacy Review
approvals.nextAction: Complete legal review of the Privacy page before full public launch.
approvals.verification: LUX_LEGAL_SYNC_LAUNCH=1 ... LUX_LEGAL_REVIEW_ITEM=privacy ... node tools/set-legal-review-status.mjs && node tools/qa-release-readiness.mjs

approvals.label: Terms Review
approvals.nextAction: Complete legal review of the Terms page before full public launch.
approvals.verification: LUX_LEGAL_SYNC_LAUNCH=1 ... LUX_LEGAL_REVIEW_ITEM=terms ... node tools/set-legal-review-status.mjs && node tools/qa-release-readiness.mjs

approvals.label: Functions Deploy IAM
approvals.nextAction: Approve and grant roles/iam.serviceAccountUser on lux-veritas-media@appspot.gserviceaccount.com to github-actions-firebase@lux-veritas-media.iam.gserviceaccount.com, then rerun the manual Functions workflow.
notes: Live Functions are deployed; this hardens future manual Functions deploy automation.
Do not mutate IAM without explicit project-owner approval.

approvals.label: External Workflow Target
approvals.nextAction: Approve google_workspace as the first external private workflow target, including receiver owner, receiver location, signing material, replay owner, rollback owner, retention expectations, and legal-version evidence owner; keep firebase_handoff as rollback until live write, replay, and operator-report checks pass.
notes: Keep firebase_handoff active until a human-approved receiver owner, receiver location, signing material, replay owner, and rollback owner are approved outside this repo.

approvals.label: Seed/Binder Private Upload
approvals.nextAction: Approve uploading the curated Lux Veritas Website Build package to the private Lux Veritas Website Build folder for Arie/collaborator access; exclude source zips, local caches, secrets, internal ecosystem seed/binder materials, and internal LuxFlow OS app folders.
notes: Do not upload secrets, local caches, source zips, or internal-only seed materials into public repo paths.

approvals.label: Event Terms
approvals.nextAction: Add Event Terms before ticketing, paid events, or public RSVP goes live.
approvals.verification: Review event flow and rerun legal/release QA.
notes: Not required while events remain request-access only.

approvals.label: Purchase/Membership Terms
approvals.nextAction: Add Purchase/Membership terms before commerce, paid membership, paid drops, shipping, refunds, or cancellations go live.
approvals.verification: Review commerce flow and rerun legal/release QA.
notes: Not required while store and membership remain waitlist-only.
